title: Better PVP
description: Is a vanilla-inspired Minecraft PvP modpack designed to enhance your combat experience without losing the classic feel.
body: ![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20b2bd5b0d651697325384ad7374e3de872c35ee.png)Is a vanilla-inspired Minecraft PvP modpack designed to enhance your combat experience without losing the classic feel. With mods that improve performance, optimize hit registration, and offer quality-of-life tweaks, fights are smoother, faster, and more responsive. Perfect for players who love vanilla PvP but want an edge in skill-based battles.
